response:
Brittany needs to calculate her total shampoo usage for a leap year, which has 366 days. Since she washes her hair every other day, she will use shampoo on 183 days, consuming 45.75 ounces in total. This means she will need to purchase [number of bottles] to ensure she has enough supply for the entire year without running out.

To find the exact number of bottles, divide the total ounces needed by the 14-ounce bottle size, which results in approximately 3.27 bottles. Therefore, she must round up to buy 4 bottles to cover the [total duration] of the leap year.
